mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS spotId, s.name AS spotName, s.city AS city, ROUND(6371 * acos( LEAST(1.0, GREATEST(-1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(s.latitude)) * cos(radians(s.longitude) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(s.latitude)) )) ), 1) AS distanceKm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_fish_record r WHERE r.spot_id = s.id AND r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND r.deleted = 0) AS heatScore, s.avg_rating AS avgRating FROM t_fishing_spot s WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND 6371 * acos( LEAST(1.0, GREATEST(-1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(s.latitude)) * cos(radians(s.longitude) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(s.latitude)) )) ) <= #{radiusKm} ORDER BY distanceKm ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT s.id AS spotId, s.name AS spotName, s.city AS city, ROUND(6371 * acos( LEAST(1.0, GREATEST(-1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(s.latitude)) * cos(radians(s.longitude) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(s.latitude)) )) ), 1) AS distanceKm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_fish_record r WHERE r.spot_id = s.id AND r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND r.deleted = 0) AS heatScore, s.avg_rating AS avgRating FROM t_fishing_spot s WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND 6371 * acos( LEAST(1.0, GREATEST(-1.0, cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(s.latitude)) * cos(radians(s.longitude) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(s.latitude)) )) ) <= #{radiusKm} ORDER BY heatScore DESC, distanceKm ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
